name: Cloudflare Containers
description: Container workloads on Cloudflare's edge with 10ms billing granularity — among the most economical for short / bursty work. Containers are paired with a Worker that controls their lifecycle. Authenticated with a Cloudflare API token scoped to Workers + Containers.

credential_fields.name: api_token
credential_fields.label: API Token
credential_fields.description: Cloudflare API token with Workers Scripts:Edit + Containers:Edit permissions

credential_fields.name: account_id
credential_fields.label: Account ID
credential_fields.description: Cloudflare account ID from the dashboard URL or `cf account list`

tools.name: list_containers
tools.description: List container applications in the account.

tools.name: create_container
tools.description: Create a container application. Args: name, image (registry path), instance_type (dev|basic|standard), max_instances?, scheduling_policy? (regional|moon).

tools.name: get_container
tools.description: Get one container application. Args: app_id.

tools.name: update_container
tools.description: Update a container application (rolling deploy if image changes). Args: app_id, image?, max_instances?, env?.

tools.name: delete_container
tools.description: Delete a container application + stop all instances. Args: app_id.

tools.name: list_instances
tools.description: List running instances for an application. Args: app_id.

tools.name: list_registry_credentials
tools.description: List private-registry credentials configured for pulling container images.
